mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT * FROM reservation ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation(user_id, session_id, players_count, status) VALUES(#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{playersCount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(players_count), 0) FROM reservation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = #{status}
